_impl_status: E-SC-5 (Layer 2 vigilance): all 7 sub-sensors active. typosquat + publish-cadence + maintainer-delta + transitive-surface + signature-gap + binary-reproducibility + exfil-indicator. Registry-metadata 7-day file cache. NO external scanner binaries. Default weight 0.0 (advisory) per spec §16.3.
